pi_items.source: Task description and explicit verifier logic expectation.
Task description and explicit verifier logic expectation.

privileged_info_summary: The task specifies C:\workspace\output\incursion_point.gpx as the output path and Incursion as the waypoint name. The verifier uses 100.0 and 30.0 meters as fair and excellent spatial accuracy thresholds respectively. However, the required setup script and ground truth tracks (Suspect_Vehicle and Refuge_Boundary) are completely missing from the benchmark repository, meaning the environment initialization is fundamentally broken.
